name: Molded Crunch Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. DRAIN the grapefruit sections, saving the juice.
2. Add water to the juice to make 1 cup of liquid.
3. HEAT the mixture to boiling, then ADD the gelatin and dissolve thoroughly.
4. COOL the mixture.
5. STIR in buttermilk.
6. FOLD in the drained fruit.
7. FOLD in the mandarin oranges, celery, and nuts.
8. SPOON into a ring mold and CHILL.
